title: Premium Foldable Clothes Drying Hanger with 20 Clips, Anti-Rusty Plastic Drying Rack for Socks, Lingeries, Delicates and Baby Clothes
features: 【PERFECT DESIGN】Designed a convenient rotating neck, smooth swivel hook. The 360° rotatable laundry hanger can be rotated to any angle you want and it is easy to dry laundry from all directions. Hanger clips are perfectly spaced to efficiently maximize air flow. Our laundry hanger- Make your air drying easier!

【SPACE SAVING】FOYERNUAGE laundry hanger hang up to 20 small items in 1 compact space for multipurpose drying or storage. Collapses flat when not in use for easy storage, save 50% space. This foldable drying hanger is also lightweight and perfect for daily household use and trips.
【EFFICIENCY】This dry rack for clothes can be combined with one more 20 or 32 clips drying racks to dry more items at the same time! Simplify your laundry day!

【MULTIPURPOSE】Our dry rack for clothes is designed for both hand washing and machine washing items, fits for hanging towel, underwear, scarf, panties, bras, shirt, tie, hat, socks, masks, baby clothes, handkerchief or other clothes. Easy to hang it on closets, shower curtain rod, laundry room, outside clothesline etc.
【SERVICE】Try it now and buy with confidence! Feel free to contact us first if you have any problem.
description: Product Description Windproof design Larger inside and small outside, not easy to blow off. 360° rotatable The 360° rotatable clip hangers can be rotated to any angle you want and it is easy to dry laundry from all directions. It is made of high quality plastic, extremely sturdy and durable. Vertical extension hook There is a vertical extension hook, which could be used to combined with one more 20 or 32 clips drying racks. Serrated clips The head of the clip has anti-slip serrations to prevent your delicates from falling off easily, but will not leave marks on your cleaned clothes. Thickened and removable clips The clips in our product are more thick than others. And they are removable, which it is convenient for storage. Space saving and multifunction use Our laundry hanger hang up to 20 or 32 small items in 1 compact space for multipurpose drying or storage. Collapses flat when not in use for easy storage, save 50% space.
